subject: Continuous Random Variables
question: Let $X_1, X_2, X_3$ be three independent, identically distributed random variables each with density function $f(x) = \begin{cases} 3x^2 & 0 \le x \le 1 \\ 0 & \text{otherwise} \end{cases}$ Let $Y = \max\{X_1, X_2, X_3\}$. Find $\Pr\left(Y > \frac{1}{2}\right)$.
